TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kalitang ŤĪÜŚ≠ź == Masamaanay ko kalitang šĽÄťļľśėĮŤĪÜŚ≠ź O kalitang hananay i, o masa tosatosaay ko papah ato saciheci sa i matafoay no podac ko heci nila, ira ko todongay o kakaenen no tamdaw, ira ko o sapakaen to 'ayam ato fafoy, ira ko caay kangaay a ka^enen, 'adiay ko kasasilomaloma nira, o sowal no mafana'ay ami kingkiw a tamdaw i, itini i hekkal i, pakalaay to kalo kalitang i, ma^deng pakaalaay to tasa a 'emangan ko kasasilomaloma nila saan, onian a kalitang hananay, fangcalay a kaladatengen, mangaay a sasimalen, ato malo sapakaen to kalo 'ayam ato fafoy, ilanaan a caay kanga'ay a kaennen a kalidang i, ilaay tola kohi ato keke hananay, olanan a Ingkilis to kalitang hananay i o 'Bean' haan nangla. O pinangan no kalitang ŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄŚďĀÁ®ģ Adihay kola pinangan no kalitang hananay, ano hapinangan haan kiakafana'an no mita i, aratek ^deng ola 'tata'angay a kalitang' 'matia o kayko a kalitang' 'kandaway kalitang' 'kahengangay kalitang' 'naniwac a kalitang' , ano o iyofong no kalitang ko pi'alawan i alatek a^deng a tosa aca Sakacecay i malecad toya tata'akay a kalitang tora takalaway a Tanpayce ato takalaway a Cefang hananay, Sakatosa i olannan a takalaway ko Tansoyhoahewo hananay, matiya tola kandaway a kalitang ato kahenganay a kalitang. Ano mafana' ami tangtang i, ma^deng a malafangcalay a nananomen aca malakohaw, sapadang to kaen to lanam ato laho ato lafi. O iyofong no kalitang. ŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄť§äŚąÜ Ano dodoen komi kinkiwan no Amilikaay to pakayniay i iyofong no kalitang i, o sowal nangla sowalsa awaay komi kikakaay toka takalaw no kalitang to pakaylaay 'icel no iyofong ami sanga'ay salof to fitoka ato tina'i no tamdaw saan tora 'resistant starch' hananay, mala omi tenna'ay to ^kang hananay a adada kora 'butyrate' , itini i tileng no tamdaw, Iraay ko takalaway a Tampayce hananay no kalitang. Onian hananay a kalitang i adihayay koka fangcal nila, ngalefeng toya kohetingay hananay a kalitang, mikikaka koka adihay no iyofong nira, imatini sato i adihay ko mafana'ay ki^emel to kakaenen, sanaw irakopipili' to kalitang a komaen, ano masaheto sato akomaen to kalitang i, o malasaka tatiih masoso ko tileng, nawhani takalaway ko otong nira tora tinfen hananay, o sowal no mafana'ay omi kingkiway to kalitang a tamdaw i, ma^deng sepat ko kasasiloma nira. Sakacecay(1). Takalaway ko otong a kalitang. O kalokalitang hananay i, caay to kalecad a takalaw adihay ko Tampayce nira, malecad toya kandaway kalitang,kahengayay kalitang,yananiwac kalitang,hongtiay kalitang, hayito cayto kalecad koka adihay no iyofong nira, o kahengayay ato kangdaway a kalitang i, o tampayce nira ma^deng i 20%, o salang nira to Tansoywhahewo ma^deng 60%, ano malalid ami kakaen i, matiyato o pikakaen to hemay, tosaka tanetek no tileng. Sakatosa(2). Takalaway ko Tampayce a kalidang. Woyana takalaway ko Tampayce a kalitang i, malecad toya kohetingay a kalitang, maloloay a kalitang, yacifanohay a kalitang, yaholindaw, omi-sangaan to nano kalitang a kakaenen i, saheto to fangcalay to kalotileng, manga'ay a misamaamaan ami sanga' to pakaylaay i kalitang hananay, ano o nananomen to, aca ano o mi'icangan a kalokasi to, 'adihay kopi sanga' to kasasiroma to pakayniay i kalitang hananay. Sakatolo(3). O malasinaferay a kalitang. O hatiniay a kalitang hananay i, matiyaay tora holintaw, ira ko ko^sannay a kalitang, ka'edaway a kalitang, no holamay a kalitang, o hatiniay a kalitang matiya o kalodateng ano malanam, malahok, malafi to dateng ami pacamol a koma^en to hemay. Sakasepat 4.O sasimalen a kalitang. Masamaanay kora sasimalen a kalitang hananay, nawhani itini i kolo kalitang, iraay ko kalasimalay, iraay ko caay kalasimal, mato o kodasing, siawiyi hananay a kalitang, oranang saheto o kalasimalay a kalitang to sasasimalen, fangsalay to sapasimal to dateng ano mi tangtang, nikaolira mafana' to amipatatodong ami pasimal to tatangtangen a sinafer, tiya caay ka kali'ang ko tileng a komaen. Lomasato iraay koya cifanohay hananay a kalitang, olanan a kalitang i, o sowal no mafana'ay a tamdaw i, takalaw ko iyofong nira saan, sanaw manga'ay to a malalid ami kakaen, to sapatongal to caay ka^deng ko kaen to titi no 'ayam ato fafoy, sanaw ano malalid ami kakaen tora cifanohay hananay a kalitang i, matiyato o komaenay to titi, sanaw ola cifanohay hananay a kalitang i, itini i polong no kalo kalitang i , dengan cingra ko satakalaway adihayay ko tanpayce hananay, mikikakaay to fita'ol koka adihay nira, sanaw ano atatodong kopi kakaen tora kalitang i, saka fangcal saka tanektek no tileng no tamdaw saan. Iraay haca koya mato satekek no 'alilis a kalitang hananay, olanan a kalitang i, ano ma'ikes to i, ko^sitay ko podac nira, oloma iraay komi pacakayay i pipacakayan, ohatilaay a kalitang i, samaanen ami tangtang a komaen hakiya sako milicayay, nawhani 'atekakay ko podac nira, sanaw mili'ayaw ami podac to podac nira, toyaheci no kalitang, tala'ayaw ami tangtang a komaen i, mili'ayaw ami sa'sa' to cecay a dadayay, ma^deng to ko poni' nira, tiya misatapang ami tangtang, ga'ayay ami sapacamol to hemay ami sacacak, itini i loma a finacadan adihay ko maolahay a tamdaw a koma^en to hatiniay a kalitang, lomasato no irangen kola heci nira i, mato han o otong ami tangtang, mafasaw cira tiya pacamol haan to koli, matiya tora Pincilin ato Sala , tada fangcalay a kaenen, adihay a tamdaw maolahay a komaen, manga'ay a sapacamol to loma a sinafer a komaen, ano itini to i lanam ato i lahok ato ilafi a komaen, ato sapa tawsi a komaen, tada maolahay ko tamdaw a komaan. Saikolay to a sowal to kalitang.ŚįćŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄŚĺĆŤ©Ī O kalitang hananay i, itini i kalo'orip nomita o 'Amis/Pangcah hananay, o todongay o kananaman to nomita a dateng, ano o lanam to ano o lahok to ano o lafi to, caay ka^ca pacamol to kalitang a dateng, ano malawod ko pi'anipan aco o pipanayan to sapa timsim to matayalay, o hemay pacacamol aca to naniwac a kalitang, lomasato i ano misadateng i taliyok no loma' a womah tora likot hananay i, tadafangcalay ami palomaan to kalitang, ano fangcal ko lengaw nora kalitang, kalamkamay aciheci, sanaw lahodayay a datengen, alate kora kogengelay a papah no kalitang i, nga'ayay a datengen a malo dateng i taheka, sanaw ira koya secito hananay no Holam , o manga'ayay ami samihecaheca ami paloma to ranan a kalitang a sanay.(Siwkolan Amis/Pangcah Suman 1019/'24) TahapinanangŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô: 2. Angiosperm Phylogeny Website FABACEAE: 2012-09-10.

ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ira ko~u o~u sapaka…ôn to~u °ajam ato~u fafo~uj, ira ko~u ¶aaj kaŇčaaj a ka Ē…ôn…ôn, °a…¨~…ģiaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma nira, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj ami kiŇčkiw a tam…¨~…ģaw i, itini i ńß…ôkka…ĺ i, paka…ĺaaj to~u ka…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč i, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč pakaa…ĺaaj to~u tasa a °…ômaŇčan ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ni…ĺa saan, o~unian a ka…ĺitaŇč ko~uńßi ato~u k…ôk…ô ńßananaj, o~u…ĺanan a iŇčki…ĺis to~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i o~u °b~b~v…ôan ° ńßaan naŇč…ĺa. o~u pinaŇčan no~u ka…ĺitaŇč ***** a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u…ĺa pinaŇčan no~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, tanso~ujwńßańß…ôwo~u ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč **%, ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn i, matijato~u o~u pikaka…ôn to~u ńß…ômaj, to~usaka tan…ôt…ôk no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč. sakato~usa(*). taka…ĺawaj ko~u tampaj ¶…ô a ka…ĺi…¨~…ģaŇč. wo~ujana taka…ĺawaj ko~u tampaj ¶…ô a ka…ĺitaŇč i, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~uja ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ma…ĺo~u…ĺo~uaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ja ¶ifano~uńßaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, jańßo~u…ĺin…¨~…ģaw, o~umi-saŇčaan to~u nano~u ka…ĺitaŇč a kaka…ôn…ôn i, sańß…ôto~u to~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj to~u ka…ĺo~uti…ĺ…ôŇč, maŇča °aj a misamaamaan ami saŇča ° to~u pakaj…ĺaaj i ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, ano~u o~u nanano~um…ôn to~u, a ¶a ano~u o~u mi °i ¶aŇčan a ka…ĺo~ukasi to~u, °a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~upi saŇča ° to~u kasasiro~uma to~u pakajniaj i ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj. sakato~u…ĺo~u(*). o~u ma…ĺasinaf…ôraj a ka…ĺitaŇč. o~u ńßatiniaj a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, matijaaj to~ura ńßo~u…ĺintaw, ira ko~u ko~u Ēsannaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ka °…ô…¨~…ģawaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, no~u ńßo~u…ĺamaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~u ńßatiniaj a ka…ĺitaŇč matija o~u ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč ano~u ma…ĺanam, ma…ĺańßo~uk, ma…ĺafi to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ami pa ¶amo~u…ĺ a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u ńß…ômaj. sakas…ôpat *.o~u sasima…ĺ…ôn a ka…ĺitaŇč. masamaanaj ko~ura sasima…ĺ…ôn a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, nawńßani itini i ko~u…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč, iraaj ko~u ka…ĺasima…ĺaj, iraaj ko~u ¶aaj ka…ĺasima…ĺ, mato~u o~u ko~u…¨~…ģasiŇč, siawiji ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~uranaŇč sańß…ôto~u o~u ka…ĺasima…ĺaj a ka…ĺitaŇč to~u sasasima…ĺ…ôn, faŇčsa…ĺaj to~u sapasima…ĺ to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ano~u mi taŇčtaŇč, nikao~u…ĺira mafana ° to~u amipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ami pasima…ĺ to~u tataŇčtaŇč…ôn a sinaf…ôr, tija ¶aaj ka ka…ĺi °aŇč ko~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč a ko~uma…ôn. …ĺo~umasato~u iraaj ko~uja ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~u…ĺanan a ka…ĺitaŇč i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, taka…ĺaw ko~u ijo~ufo~uŇč nira saan, sanaw maŇča °aj to~u a ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn, to~u sapato~uŇča…ĺ to~u ¶aaj ka Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u ka…ôn to~u titi no~u °ajam ato~u fafo~uj, sanaw ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn to~ura ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, matijato~u o~u ko~uma…ônaj to~u titi, sanaw o~u…ĺa ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ka…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč i , …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ¶iŇčra ko~u sataka…ĺawaj a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u tanpaj ¶…ô ńßananaj, mikikakaaj to~u fita °o~u…ĺ ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj nira, sanaw ano~u atato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~upi kaka…ôn to~ura ka…ĺitaŇč i, saka faŇč ¶a…ĺ saka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw saan. iraaj ńßa ¶a ko~uja mato~u sat…ôk…ôk no~u °a…ĺi…ĺis a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, o~u…ĺanan a ka…ĺitaŇč i, ano~u ma °ik…ôs to~u i, ko~u Ēsitaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, o~u…ĺo~uma iraaj ko~umi pa ¶akajaj i pipa ¶akajan, o~uńßati…ĺaaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, samaan…ôn ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma…ôn ńßakija sako~u mi…ĺi ¶ajaj, nawńßani °at…ôkakaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, sanaw mi…ĺi °ajaw ami po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ to~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, to~ujańß…ô ¶i no~u ka…ĺitaŇč, ta…ĺa °ajaw ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma…ôn i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ami sa °sa ° to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģajaj, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u po~uni ° nira, tija misatapaŇč ami taŇčtaŇč, *a °ajaj ami sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ńß…ômaj ami sa ¶a ¶ak, itini i …ĺo~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u mao~u…ĺańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u ńßatiniaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, …ĺo~umasato~u no~u iraŇč…ôn ko~u…ĺa ńß…ô ¶i nira i, mato~u ńßan o~u o~uto~uŇč ami taŇčtaŇč, mafasaw ¶ira tija pa ¶amo~u…ĺ ńßaan to~u ko~u…ĺi, matija to~ura pin ¶i…ĺin ato~u sa…ĺa , ta…¨~…ģa faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a ka…ôn…ôn, a…¨~…ģińßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw mao~u…ĺańßaj a ko~uma…ôn, maŇča °aj a sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u …ĺo~uma a sinaf…ôr a ko~uma…ôn, ano~u itini to~u i …ĺanam ato~u i …ĺańßo~uk ato~u i…ĺafi a ko~uma…ôn, ato~u sapa tawsi a ko~uma…ôn, ta…¨~…ģa mao~u…ĺańßaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~umaan. saiko~u…ĺaj to~u a so~uwa…ĺ to~u ka…ĺitaŇč.****** o~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, itini i ka…ĺo~u °o~urip no~umita o~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß ńßananaj, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u kananaman to~u no~umita a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, ano~u o~u …ĺanam to~u ano~u o~u …ĺańßo~uk to~u ano~u o~u …ĺafi to~u, ¶aaj ka Ē ¶a pa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ka…ĺitaŇč a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, ano~u ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u pi °anipan a ¶o~u o~u pipanajan to~u sapa timsim to~u mataja…ĺaj, o~u ńß…ômaj pa ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ a ¶a to~u naniwa ¶ a ka…ĺitaŇč, …ĺo~umasato~u i ano~u misa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč i ta…ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺo~uma ° a wo~umańß to~ura …ĺiko~ut ńßananaj i, ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan to~u ka…ĺitaŇč, ano~u faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~ura ka…ĺitaŇč, ka…ĺamkamaj a ¶ińß…ô ¶i, sanaw …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, a…ĺat…ô ko~ura ko~u*…ôŇč…ô…ĺaj a papańß no~u ka…ĺitaŇč i, Ňča °ajaj a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn a ma…ĺo~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč i tańß…ôka, sanaw ira ko~uja s…ô ¶ito~u ńßananaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺam , o~u maŇča °ajaj ami samińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶a ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u ranan a ka…ĺitaŇč a sanaj.(siwko~u…ĺan amis/paŇč ¶ańß so~u~uman ****/ °**) tańßapinanaŇč****: *. aŇčio~usp…ôrm pńßj…ĺo~u*…ônj w…ôb~b~vsit…ô fab~b~va ¶…ôa…ô: ****-**-**.
S.FORM: == Kalitang ŤĪÜŚ≠ź == Masamaanay ko kalitang šĽÄťļľśėĮŤĪÜŚ≠ź O kalitang hananay i, o masa tosatosaay ko papah ato saciheci sa i matafoay no podac ko heci nila, ira ko todongay o kakaenen no tamdaw, ira ko o sapakaen to 'ayam ato fafoy, ira ko caay kangaay a ka^enen, 'adiay ko kasasilomaloma nira, o sowal no mafana'ay ami kingkiw a tamdaw i, itini i hekkal i, pakalaay to kalo kalitang i, ma^deng pakaalaay to tasa a 'emangan ko kasasilomaloma nila saan, onian a kalitang hananay, fangcalay a kaladatengen, mangaay a sasimalen, ato malo sapakaen to kalo 'ayam ato fafoy, ilanaan a caay kanga'ay a kaennen a kalidang i, ilaay tola kohi ato keke hananay, olanan a Ingkilis to kalitang hananay i o 'Bean' haan nangla. O pinangan no kalitang ŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄŚďĀÁ®ģ Adihay kola pinangan no kalitang hananay, ano hapinangan haan kiakafana'an no mita i, aratek ^deng ola 'tata'angay a kalitang' 'matia o kayko a kalitang' 'kandaway kalitang' 'kahengangay kalitang' 'naniwac a kalitang' , ano o iyofong no kalitang ko pi'alawan i alatek a^deng a tosa aca Sakacecay i malecad toya tata'akay a kalitang tora takalaway a Tanpayce ato takalaway a Cefang hananay, Sakatosa i olannan a takalaway ko Tansoyhoahewo hananay, matiya tola kandaway a kalitang ato kahenganay a kalitang. Ano mafana' ami tangtang i, ma^deng a malafangcalay a nananomen aca malakohaw, sapadang to kaen to lanam ato laho ato lafi. O iyofong no kalitang. ŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄť§äŚąÜ Ano dodoen komi kinkiwan no Amilikaay to pakayniay i iyofong no kalitang i, o sowal nangla sowalsa awaay komi kikakaay toka takalaw no kalitang to pakaylaay 'icel no iyofong ami sanga'ay salof to fitoka ato tina'i no tamdaw saan tora 'resistant starch' hananay, mala omi tenna'ay to ^kang hananay a adada kora 'butyrate' , itini i tileng no tamdaw, Iraay ko takalaway a Tampayce hananay no kalitang. Onian hananay a kalitang i adihayay koka fangcal nila, ngalefeng toya kohetingay hananay a kalitang, mikikaka koka adihay no iyofong nira, imatini sato i adihay ko mafana'ay ki^emel to kakaenen, sanaw irakopipili' to kalitang a komaen, ano masaheto sato akomaen to kalitang i, o malasaka tatiih masoso ko tileng, nawhani takalaway ko otong nira tora tinfen hananay, o sowal no mafana'ay omi kingkiway to kalitang a tamdaw i, ma^deng sepat ko kasasiloma nira. Sakacecay(1). Takalaway ko otong a kalitang. O kalokalitang hananay i, caay to kalecad a takalaw adihay ko Tampayce nira, malecad toya kandaway kalitang,kahengayay kalitang,yananiwac kalitang,hongtiay kalitang, hayito cayto kalecad koka adihay no iyofong nira, o kahengayay ato kangdaway a kalitang i, o tampayce nira ma^deng i 20%, o salang nira to Tansoywhahewo ma^deng 60%, ano malalid ami kakaen i, matiyato o pikakaen to hemay, tosaka tanetek no tileng. Sakatosa(2). Takalaway ko Tampayce a kalidang. Woyana takalaway ko Tampayce a kalitang i, malecad toya kohetingay a kalitang, maloloay a kalitang, yacifanohay a kalitang, yaholindaw, omi-sangaan to nano kalitang a kakaenen i, saheto to fangcalay to kalotileng, manga'ay a misamaamaan ami sanga' to pakaylaay i kalitang hananay, ano o nananomen to, aca ano o mi'icangan a kalokasi to, 'adihay kopi sanga' to kasasiroma to pakayniay i kalitang hananay. Sakatolo(3). O malasinaferay a kalitang. O hatiniay a kalitang hananay i, matiyaay tora holintaw, ira ko ko^sannay a kalitang, ka'edaway a kalitang, no holamay a kalitang, o hatiniay a kalitang matiya o kalodateng ano malanam, malahok, malafi to dateng ami pacamol a koma^en to hemay. Sakasepat 4.O sasimalen a kalitang. Masamaanay kora sasimalen a kalitang hananay, nawhani itini i kolo kalitang, iraay ko kalasimalay, iraay ko caay kalasimal, mato o kodasing, siawiyi hananay a kalitang, oranang saheto o kalasimalay a kalitang to sasasimalen, fangsalay to sapasimal to dateng ano mi tangtang, nikaolira mafana' to amipatatodong ami pasimal to tatangtangen a sinafer, tiya caay ka kali'ang ko tileng a komaen. Lomasato iraay koya cifanohay hananay a kalitang, olanan a kalitang i, o sowal no mafana'ay a tamdaw i, takalaw ko iyofong nira saan, sanaw manga'ay to a malalid ami kakaen, to sapatongal to caay ka^deng ko kaen to titi no 'ayam ato fafoy, sanaw ano malalid ami kakaen tora cifanohay hananay a kalitang i, matiyato o komaenay to titi, sanaw ola cifanohay hananay a kalitang i, itini i polong no kalo kalitang i , dengan cingra ko satakalaway adihayay ko tanpayce hananay, mikikakaay to fita'ol koka adihay nira, sanaw ano atatodong kopi kakaen tora kalitang i, saka fangcal saka tanektek no tileng no tamdaw saan. Iraay haca koya mato satekek no 'alilis a kalitang hananay, olanan a kalitang i, ano ma'ikes to i, ko^sitay ko podac nira, oloma iraay komi pacakayay i pipacakayan, ohatilaay a kalitang i, samaanen ami tangtang a komaen hakiya sako milicayay, nawhani 'atekakay ko podac nira, sanaw mili'ayaw ami podac to podac nira, toyaheci no kalitang, tala'ayaw ami tangtang a komaen i, mili'ayaw ami sa'sa' to cecay a dadayay, ma^deng to ko poni' nira, tiya misatapang ami tangtang, ga'ayay ami sapacamol to hemay ami sacacak, itini i loma a finacadan adihay ko maolahay a tamdaw a koma^en to hatiniay a kalitang, lomasato no irangen kola heci nira i, mato han o otong ami tangtang, mafasaw cira tiya pacamol haan to koli, matiya tora Pincilin ato Sala , tada fangcalay a kaenen, adihay a tamdaw maolahay a komaen, manga'ay a sapacamol to loma a sinafer a komaen, ano itini to i lanam ato i lahok ato ilafi a komaen, ato sapa tawsi a komaen, tada maolahay ko tamdaw a komaan. Saikolay to a sowal to kalitang.ŚįćŤĪÜŚ≠źÁöĄŚĺĆŤ©Ī O kalitang hananay i, itini i kalo'orip nomita o 'Amis/Pangcah hananay, o todongay o kananaman to nomita a dateng, ano o lanam to ano o lahok to ano o lafi to, caay ka^ca pacamol to kalitang a dateng, ano malawod ko pi'anipan aco o pipanayan to sapa timsim to matayalay, o hemay pacacamol aca to naniwac a kalitang, lomasato i ano misadateng i taliyok no loma' a womah tora likot hananay i, tadafangcalay ami palomaan to kalitang, ano fangcal ko lengaw nora kalitang, kalamkamay aciheci, sanaw lahodayay a datengen, alate kora kogengelay a papah no kalitang i, nga'ayay a datengen a malo dateng i taheka, sanaw ira koya secito hananay no Holam , o manga'ayay ami samihecaheca ami paloma to ranan a kalitang a sanay.(Siwkolan Amis/Pangcah Suman 1019/'24) TahapinanangŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô: 2. Angiosperm Phylogeny Website FABACEAE: 2012-09-10.
S.PHON: == ka…ĺitaŇč ** == masamaanaj ko~u ka…ĺitaŇč ***** o~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, o~u masa to~usato~usaaj ko~u papańß ato~u sa ¶ińß…ô ¶i sa i matafo~uaj no~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ ko~u ńß…ô ¶i ni…ĺa, ira ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u kaka…ôn…ôn no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, ira ko~u o~u sapaka…ôn to~u °ajam ato~u fafo~uj, ira ko~u ¶aaj kaŇčaaj a ka Ē…ôn…ôn, °a…¨~…ģiaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma nira, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj ami kiŇčkiw a tam…¨~…ģaw i, itini i ńß…ôkka…ĺ i, paka…ĺaaj to~u ka…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč i, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč pakaa…ĺaaj to~u tasa a °…ômaŇčan ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma…ĺo~uma ni…ĺa saan, o~unian a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a ka…ĺa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč…ôn, maŇčaaj a sasima…ĺ…ôn, ato~u ma…ĺo~u sapaka…ôn to~u ka…ĺo~u °ajam ato~u fafo~uj, i…ĺanaan a ¶aaj kaŇča °aj a ka…ônn…ôn a ka…ĺi…¨~…ģaŇč i, i…ĺaaj to~u…ĺa ko~uńßi ato~u k…ôk…ô ńßananaj, o~u…ĺanan a iŇčki…ĺis to~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i o~u °b~b~v…ôan ° ńßaan naŇč…ĺa. o~u pinaŇčan no~u ka…ĺitaŇč ***** a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u…ĺa pinaŇčan no~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, ano~u ńßapinaŇčan ńßaan kiakafana °an no~u mita i, arat…ôk Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč o~u…ĺa °tata °aŇčaj a ka…ĺitaŇč ° °matia o~u kajko~u a ka…ĺitaŇč ° °kan…¨~…ģawaj ka…ĺitaŇč ° °kańß…ôŇčaŇčaj ka…ĺitaŇč ° °naniwa ¶ a ka…ĺitaŇč ° , ano~u o~u ijo~ufo~uŇč no~u ka…ĺitaŇč ko~u pi °a…ĺawan i a…ĺat…ôk a Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč a to~usa a ¶a saka ¶…ô ¶aj i ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~uja tata °akaj a ka…ĺitaŇč to~ura taka…ĺawaj a tanpaj ¶…ô ato~u taka…ĺawaj a ¶…ôfaŇč ńßananaj, sakato~usa i o~u…ĺannan a taka…ĺawaj ko~u tanso~ujńßo~uańß…ôwo~u ńßananaj, matija to~u…ĺa kan…¨~…ģawaj a ka…ĺitaŇč ato~u kańß…ôŇčanaj a ka…ĺitaŇč. ano~u mafana ° ami taŇčtaŇč i, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč a ma…ĺafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a nanano~um…ôn a ¶a ma…ĺako~uńßaw, sapa…¨~…ģaŇč to~u ka…ôn to~u …ĺanam ato~u …ĺańßo~u ato~u …ĺafi. o~u ijo~ufo~uŇč no~u ka…ĺitaŇč. ***** ano~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u ijo~ufo~uŇč ami saŇča °aj sa…ĺo~uf to~u fito~uka ato~u tina °i no~u tam…¨~…ģaw saan to~ura °r…ôsistant star ¶ńß ° ńßananaj, ma…ĺa o~umi t…ônna °aj to~u ĒkaŇč ńßananaj a a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa ko~ura °b~b~vo~u~utjrat…ô ° , itini i ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw, iraaj ko~u taka…ĺawaj a tampaj ¶…ô ńßananaj no~u ka…ĺitaŇč. o~unian ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~uka faŇč ¶a…ĺ ni…ĺa, irako~upipi…ĺi ° to~u ka…ĺitaŇč a ko~uma…ôn, ano~u masańß…ôto~u sato~u ako~uma…ôn to~u ka…ĺitaŇč i, o~u ma…ĺasaka tatiińß maso~uso~u ko~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč, nawńßani taka…ĺawaj ko~u o~uto~uŇč nira to~ura tinf…ôn ńßananaj, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj o~umi kiŇčkiwaj to~u ka…ĺitaŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw i, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč s…ôpat ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira. saka ¶…ô ¶aj(*). taka…ĺawaj ko~u o~uto~uŇč a ka…ĺitaŇč. o~u ka…ĺo~uka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, ¶aaj to~u ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ a taka…ĺaw a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u tampaj ¶…ô nira, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~uja kan…¨~…ģawaj ka…ĺitaŇč,kańß…ôŇčajaj ka…ĺitaŇč,jananiwa ¶ ka…ĺitaŇč,ńßo~uŇčtiaj ka…ĺitaŇč, ńßajito~u ¶ajto~u ka…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj no~u ijo~ufo~uŇč nira, o~u kańß…ôŇčajaj ato~u kaŇč…¨~…ģawaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, o~u tampaj ¶…ô nira ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč i **%, o~u sa…ĺaŇč nira to~u tanso~ujwńßańß…ôwo~u ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč **%, ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn i, matijato~u o~u pikaka…ôn to~u ńß…ômaj, to~usaka tan…ôt…ôk no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč. sakato~usa(*). taka…ĺawaj ko~u tampaj ¶…ô a ka…ĺi…¨~…ģaŇč. wo~ujana taka…ĺawaj ko~u tampaj ¶…ô a ka…ĺitaŇč i, ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~uja ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ma…ĺo~u…ĺo~uaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ja ¶ifano~uńßaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, jańßo~u…ĺin…¨~…ģaw, o~umi-saŇčaan to~u nano~u ka…ĺitaŇč a kaka…ôn…ôn i, sańß…ôto~u to~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj to~u ka…ĺo~uti…ĺ…ôŇč, maŇča °aj a misamaamaan ami saŇča ° to~u pakaj…ĺaaj i ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, ano~u o~u nanano~um…ôn to~u, a ¶a ano~u o~u mi °i ¶aŇčan a ka…ĺo~ukasi to~u, °a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~upi saŇča ° to~u kasasiro~uma to~u pakajniaj i ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj. sakato~u…ĺo~u(*). o~u ma…ĺasinaf…ôraj a ka…ĺitaŇč. o~u ńßatiniaj a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, matijaaj to~ura ńßo~u…ĺintaw, ira ko~u ko~u Ēsannaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, ka °…ô…¨~…ģawaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, no~u ńßo~u…ĺamaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~u ńßatiniaj a ka…ĺitaŇč matija o~u ka…ĺo~u…¨~…ģat…ôŇč ano~u ma…ĺanam, ma…ĺańßo~uk, ma…ĺafi to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ami pa ¶amo~u…ĺ a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u ńß…ômaj. sakas…ôpat *.o~u sasima…ĺ…ôn a ka…ĺitaŇč. masamaanaj ko~ura sasima…ĺ…ôn a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, nawńßani itini i ko~u…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč, iraaj ko~u ka…ĺasima…ĺaj, iraaj ko~u ¶aaj ka…ĺasima…ĺ, mato~u o~u ko~u…¨~…ģasiŇč, siawiji ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~uranaŇč sańß…ôto~u o~u ka…ĺasima…ĺaj a ka…ĺitaŇč to~u sasasima…ĺ…ôn, faŇčsa…ĺaj to~u sapasima…ĺ to~u …¨~…ģat…ôŇč ano~u mi taŇčtaŇč, nikao~u…ĺira mafana ° to~u amipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ami pasima…ĺ to~u tataŇčtaŇč…ôn a sinaf…ôr, tija ¶aaj ka ka…ĺi °aŇč ko~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč a ko~uma…ôn. …ĺo~umasato~u iraaj ko~uja ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč, o~u…ĺanan a ka…ĺitaŇč i, o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, taka…ĺaw ko~u ijo~ufo~uŇč nira saan, sanaw maŇča °aj to~u a ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn, to~u sapato~uŇča…ĺ to~u ¶aaj ka Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u ka…ôn to~u titi no~u °ajam ato~u fafo~uj, sanaw ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami kaka…ôn to~ura ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, matijato~u o~u ko~uma…ônaj to~u titi, sanaw o~u…ĺa ¶ifano~uńßaj ńßananaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u ka…ĺo~u ka…ĺitaŇč i , …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ¶iŇčra ko~u sataka…ĺawaj a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u tanpaj ¶…ô ńßananaj, mikikakaaj to~u fita °o~u…ĺ ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj nira, sanaw ano~u atato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~upi kaka…ôn to~ura ka…ĺitaŇč i, saka faŇč ¶a…ĺ saka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u ti…ĺ…ôŇč no~u tam…¨~…ģaw saan. iraaj ńßa ¶a ko~uja mato~u sat…ôk…ôk no~u °a…ĺi…ĺis a ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj, o~u…ĺanan a ka…ĺitaŇč i, ano~u ma °ik…ôs to~u i, ko~u Ēsitaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, o~u…ĺo~uma iraaj ko~umi pa ¶akajaj i pipa ¶akajan, o~uńßati…ĺaaj a ka…ĺitaŇč i, samaan…ôn ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma…ôn ńßakija sako~u mi…ĺi ¶ajaj, nawńßani °at…ôkakaj ko~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, sanaw mi…ĺi °ajaw ami po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ to~u po~u…¨~…ģa ¶ nira, to~ujańß…ô ¶i no~u ka…ĺitaŇč, ta…ĺa °ajaw ami taŇčtaŇč a ko~uma…ôn i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ami sa °sa ° to~u ¶…ô ¶aj a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģajaj, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u po~uni ° nira, tija misatapaŇč ami taŇčtaŇč, *a °ajaj ami sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ńß…ômaj ami sa ¶a ¶ak, itini i …ĺo~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u mao~u…ĺańßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~uma Ē…ôn to~u sa…ĺa , ta…¨~…ģa faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a ka…ôn…ôn, a…¨~…ģińßaj a tam…¨~…ģaw mao~u…ĺańßaj a ko~uma…ôn, maŇča °aj a sapa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u …ĺo~uma a sinaf…ôr a ko~uma…ôn, ano~u itini to~u i …ĺanam ato~u i …ĺańßo~uk ato~u i…ĺafi a ko~uma…ôn, ato~u sapa tawsi a ko~uma…ôn, ta…¨~…ģa mao~u…ĺańßaj ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw a ko~umaan. saiko~u…ĺaj to~u a so~uwa…ĺ to~u ka…ĺitaŇč.****** o~u ka…ĺitaŇč ńßananaj i, itini i ka…ĺo~u °o~urip no~umita o~u °amis/paŇč ¶ańß ńßananaj, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u kananaman to~u no~umita a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, ano~u o~u …ĺanam to~u ano~u o~u …ĺańßo~uk to~u ano~u o~u …ĺafi to~u, ¶aaj ka Ē ¶a pa ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ka…ĺitaŇč a …¨~…ģat…ôŇč, ano~u ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u pi °anipan a ¶o~u o~u pipanajan to~u sapa timsim to~u mataja…ĺaj, o~u ńß…ômaj pa ¶a ¶amo~u…ĺ a ¶a to~u naniwa ¶ a ka…ĺitaŇč, …ĺo~umasato~u i ano~u misa…¨~…ģat…ôŇč i ta…ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺo~uma ° a wo~umańß to~ura …ĺiko~ut ńßananaj i, ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan to~u ka…ĺitaŇč, ano~u faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~ura sanaw ira ko~uja s…ô ¶ito~u ńßananaj no~u ńßo~u…ĺam , o~u maŇča °ajaj ami samińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶a ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u ranan a ka…ĺitaŇč a sanaj.(siwko~u…ĺan amis/paŇč ¶ańß so~u~uman ****/ °**)
